data.title: Donut raises $7 million to build AI-driven crypto browser
data.description:
Donut, a new crypto-native browser purpose-built for autonomous agents, announced on May 29 that it has secured $7 million in pre-seed funding to reimagine how users and AI interact with the decentralized web.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/donut-raises-7-million-to-build-ai-driven-crypto-browser/

data.title: BlackRock Reportedly Targeting Major Stake in Upcoming Crypto IPO
data.description:
Circle, the issuer behind the USDC stablecoin, is preparing to go public, and sources say BlackRock is gearing up to take a significant piece of the action—possibly acquiring 10% of the offering.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/blackrock-reportedly-targeting-major-stake-in-upcoming-crypto-ipo/

data.title: Russian Crypto Couple Rescued After $43,000 Bitcoin Kidnapping – Suspects Flee to UAE as Interpol Issues Red Notice
data.description:
The Russian crypto couple kidnapped in Buenos Aires has been freed after a $43,000 Bitcoin ransom transferred by a third Russian. Police have said the Chechen suspects have flown to the UAE; Interpol notices have been issued as part of a wider probe into rising crypto-linked abductions.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/russian-crypto-couple-kidnapped-interpol-uae-red-notice/

data.title: OpenSea Relaunches Trading Platform With Rewards Ahead of SEA Token Debut
data.description:
NFT marketplace OpenSea has fully launched "OS2" with fungible token trading and user rewards, ahead of the expected SEA token launch.
source: https://decrypt.co/322825/opensea-relaunches-platform-rewards-sea-token

data.title: US Corporate Profits Fall By 42% In Q1 As High Cost Threaten Companies
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, May 29, 2025– US corporate profits fell by 42% quarter-over-quarter in the first quarter, official data showed on Thursday, and risks from tariffs-related costs could continue throughout the year. Commerce Department’s Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) said that profits from current production with inventory valuation and capital consumption adjustments dropped $118. 1 billion last […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/us-corporate-profits-fall-by-42-in-q1-as-high-cost-threaten-companies

data.title: Symbiotic and Cap Introduce Collateral-Backed Stablecoin for Market Makers
data.description:
TL;DR Cap and Symbiotic launch Universal Staking: agents borrow funds for investments like arbitrage and market making, while stakers lock capital as collateral. When agreed returns aren’t met, automatic slashing is triggered on the operator’s collateral, covering the shortfall and preserving the stablecoin’s peg. Symbiotic’s vaults only authorize withdrawals if collateral is active and enforce.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/symbiotic-and-cap-introduce-collateral-backed-stablecoin-for-market-makers/

data.title: Citigroup’s Equity Strategist Says $2,000,000,000,000 Deficit Is Good for Economy and S&P 500 Earnings – Here’s Why
data.description:
Citigroup’s US equity strategist Scott Chronert says the ballooning US budget deficit could have a positive impact on the economy. In a new CNBC interview, Chronert says that the One Big Beautiful Bill Act recently passed in the U. S. House of Representatives will have zero effect on reducing the budget deficit
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/29/citigroups-equity-strategist-says-2000000000000-deficit-is-good-for-economy-and-sp-500-earnings-heres-why/

data.title: DOGE moves on without Musk as the work has “just begun”
data.description:
On Wednesday night, Elon Musk said farewell to the Department of Government Efficiency. The two-year-old office will now carry on without its best-known supporter as President Donald Trump moves into the second half of his term. “As my time as a Special Government Employee comes to an end, I would like to thank President @realDonaldTrump […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/doge-moves-on-without-musk/

data.title: Pakistan To Launch Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Amid Global Race For Digital Gold
data.description:
In a landmark announcement on May 28, a crypto advisor to Pakistan revealed that the government is planning to launch a strategic Bitcoin reserve. Pakistan’s move reflects the wider trend of nation-states embracing pro-crypto policies following the regulatory shift in Washington, DC under the President Donald Trump administration. Pakistan Follows The US In Embracing Bitcoin […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/pakistan-to-launch-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-amid-global-race-for-digital-gold/

data.title: Bitcoin’s Coinbase premium goes on 20-day streak even as sellers push BTC price lower
data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-s-coinbase-premium-goes-on-20-day-streak-even-as-sellers-push-btc-price-lower?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Nigel Farage to Pitch UK as ‘Crypto Powerhouse’ at Bitcoin 2025
data.description:
Key Takeaways: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage will present a draft crypto bill during the Bitcoin 2025 conference in Las Vegas. The bill proposes cutting capital gains tax on crypto to 10%, creating a regulatory sandbox, and outlawing payment discrimination.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/nigel-farage-to-pitch-uk-as-crypto-powerhouse-at-bitcoin-2025/
